raw_consumer_statement: I notified Citibank of 8 fraudulent credit card charges on my XXXX statement as soon as I received the statement. The charges were clustered over a two-day period from stores/malls I've never shopped at. Citibank never investigated the charges with the merchants to compare signatures on receipts, looked at the pattern of unusual account activity or otherwise conducted a reasonable investigation. Instead, they told me on the phone that since the credit card was in my possession, " I must have made the purchases. '' Even though I appealed their decision, without it being resolved, Citibank sent me a letter ( first time I received anything in writing ) threatening me with an adverse credit report if I didn't pay the full amount due. I am a XXXX  citizen ( age XXXX ) and the intimidation has caused me great distress. I never authorized these fraudulent charges and request your assistance in having Citibank reverse these charges.
